# pihole_dhcp_static_leases (Data Source)

Fetches all DHCP static leases.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `leases` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--leases))

<a id="nestedatt--leases"></a>
### Nested Schema for `leases`

Read-Only:

- `hostname` (String) The hostname assigned to the device.
- `id` (String)
- `ip` (String) The IP address assigned to the device.
- `mac` (String) The MAC address of the device.
